title: 🌐 Website
lead: When a customer contacts through forms available on the website (such as Contact Us, Suggestions, or Complaints), the service is automatically generated in Salesforce.

auto.title: Automatic Process
auto.text: Filling out the form creates a case in the system without the need for manual opening.

step1.title: Automatic Creation
step1.text: The customer fills out the form on the website and a case is automatically created in Salesforce.

step2.title: SAC Screening
step2.text: The service goes to SAC Screening, responsible for classifying and routing the case.

triagem.title: SAC Screening is responsible for:
triagem.item2: Routing to the responsible area when necessary (card, parking, store, IT)
triagem.item3: Responding to the customer when the solution is within SAC's scope

highlight.title: Benefit
highlight.text: This flow ensures organization, quick handling, and complete traceability of the service.

q1.text: Question: How is the service created when the customer uses the website form?
q1.feedback: Correct! Filling out the form automatically creates a case in Salesforce without the need for manual opening.
